description: Corporate editorial headshot with structurally load-bearing hair-light/rim. Frontal key shapes the face; a separate back-light creates strong specular highlights along the hair, providing subject separation from the dark background. Removing the hair-light meaningfully changes the look (hair loses sheen, separation collapses against background). Genuinely multi-source per the load-bearing operational test.

metadata.review_notes: Photographer-verified per Phase 3A correction #5: the hair-light is structurally load-bearing — without it, the look's polished editorial separation against the dark background collapses. Frontal key + back hair-light = two load-bearing sources. Per strategy §5 load-bearing operational test: this contribution materially changes subject separation (criterion 3) AND build order (criterion 6).
